Gong Yang ťĺĒś•ä/śŹö
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Yang (ťĺĒś•ä/śŹö)was born in Ba. Avenged the death of the widow Han Jiang, executing Zuo Xi and Wang Su. Gong Yang was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
